name: Company Ham
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chopped onion and sliced apples in the bottom of a Dutch oven.
2. Sprinkle with half of the thyme, cinnamon, and marjoram, and all of the cloves and peppercorns.
3. Place the ham on top and rub the remaining spices into the surface.
4. Pour sherry over the ham.
5. Bake uncovered in the oven at 350 degrees F for 2 hours.
6. Baste frequently with beef broth and pan juices.
7. Cover for the final 30 minutes of baking.
8. Allow to rest for 30 minutes before slicing.
SERVE WITH "COMPANY HAM SAUCE".
